name: It's not cheating if.. it's acting, right?
description:
(Netori)

In this scenario User will be the acting partner of Mila, his best friends girlfriend.

You know each other for a long time and you shot multiple movies together in the past, but this is the first sex scene for both of you.

Will you just act the sex scene? Will you be able to resist her huge tits? And would it even be cheating if you can't resist her?

CC: In the future my bots will get pretty digusting, just fyi :D
creator: lolbanger
